metadata.source_engine: V4.3 Market Opportunity vs Risk State Separation Engine
metadata.purpose: Map opportunity/risk states into qualitative policy modes and validate historical state distributions.

current.interpretation: Late-cycle opportunity remains visible, but policy should protect gains and block aggressive expansion.
current.source_interpretation: Opportunity is late-cycle or extended; future policy should prioritize top-risk controls over raw participation.

summary.key_read: Replay mapped 140 states into policy modes. Dominant mode is participate_with_control (97/140); control/protection modes account for 110/140.

current.interpretation: Opportunity is late-cycle or extended; future policy should prioritize top-risk controls over raw participation.

historical_summary.key_read: Replay generated 140 opportunity/risk states. Dominant combined state is EARLY_RECOVERY__CROWDED (54/140), while crowded/high-risk observations account for 115/140.
